note: Curated set of official EU policy references, tagged by sector. Used as grounding context for the evaluator's opt-in Deep AI Check — not a general-purpose legal database. Each entry links to the official Commission page; summaries are intentionally high-level (name, status, purpose) rather than paraphrased legal text, to avoid misrepresenting binding language.

policies.title: AI Act
policies.summary: EU regulation setting risk-based rules for AI systems, in force since August 2024. Sets the trustworthy-AI / risk-classification framing evaluators expect AI-related proposals to be aware of.

policies.title: Digital Decade Policy Programme 2030
policies.summary: EU-wide targets and monitoring framework for digital transformation by 2030, across digital skills, infrastructure, business digitalisation and public services — the reference framework behind most Digital Europe call priorities.

policies.title: Data Act
policies.summary: EU rules on fair access to and use of data generated by connected devices and industrial IoT, in force since January 2024.

policies.title: Data Governance Act
policies.summary: Framework for trusted data sharing, data intermediaries and data altruism, part of the European strategy for data.

policies.title: Cyber Resilience Act
policies.summary: First EU legislation setting mandatory cybersecurity requirements for products with digital elements; main obligations apply from December 2027.

policies.title: European Green Deal
policies.summary: The EU's overarching growth strategy for climate neutrality by 2050 and a binding 2030 emissions-cut target — the top-level frame most Green Tech / Energy proposals should map their impact narrative to.

policies.title: Circular Economy Action Plan
policies.summary: One of the main Green Deal building blocks (adopted 2020), covering product design, waste prevention and resource circularity across value chains.

policies.title: Critical Raw Materials Act
policies.summary: EU regulation securing the supply of critical raw materials for strategic sectors (clean energy, digital, aerospace, defence) and reducing import dependency.

policies.title: European Health Data Space
policies.summary: Regulation in force since March 2025 giving individuals control over their electronic health data and enabling secondary use of health data for research and innovation.

policies.title: Union of Skills
policies.summary: March 2025 Commission strategy for skills investment and EU competitiveness, including a Basic Skills Action Plan and a STEM Education Strategic Plan.

policies.title: Digital Education Action Plan (2021–2027)
policies.summary: Strategic vision and 14 actions for high-quality, inclusive digital education and digital skills across the EU, running 2021–2027.

policies.title: New European Innovation Agenda
policies.summary: Commission strategy for stronger, better-connected European innovation ecosystems — from Regional Innovation Valleys to the EIC Scale-up Club — so deep-tech ventures don't stall once a programme ends.
